top_signals.title: US industrial base is becoming stronger for wartime production, study finds
top_signals.summary: As recent conflicts consume weapons at a ferocious rate, America’s defense industrial base is becoming more prepared to sustain a major war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump Says US Will Be Reimbursed 20% Rate for Hormuz Traffic
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump said the US would reinstate its blockade of Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz and demanded a 20% reimbursement on all other cargo shipped through the waterway.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Joint Statement of the European Union and the United Kingdom on United Kingdom participation under the Ukraine Support Loan
